videoJson.name: 1" Type B
videoJson.fact1: This format became  the broadcasting standard  in Europe, but adoption  was limited in the  United States
videoJson.fact2: This format  began to  replace 2" quad and 1" Type A, but subsequently was largely replaced by 1" Type C for use in broadcast  television
videoJson.fact3: This format  segments each  field to 5 (NTSC) or 6  (PAL) helical  scan tracks per  field, instead  of recording  one field  per track
